one thing I want to add. That's a super important point there, Blake kind of touched on it when you're
launching an offer and you're just starting out focus on one traffic source until you get that really, really
dialed in and become a master at it. Um, I know so many people who have tried to master three
different traffic sources when they launch an offer. So they're trying to do YouTube. They're trying to do
Facebook. They're trying to do Google ads. It never works. It literally never works. Uh, the people that
do the best in this industry are usually really damn good at one traffic source. And then they later learn
how to do the other ones. So like once you have one down really, really well, and you're just crushing it,
then you start pushing more money towards something else. So it doesn't matter which one you go
after first could be. Facebook could be YouTube, could be email, whatever it is, uh, just focus on one and
keep learning about that one and keep figuring everything out. And you'll start to learn the intricacies
and, you know, you'll, you'll find all the stuff that really matters in terms of getting it to work. Um,
before you try to jump into three or four other ones, because if you try to do all three at once, you're
